title: Quran, Sura 7: Al-A'raf
description: Sura 7 (Al-A'raf: The Heights) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 7 (Al-A'raf: The Heights) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: A Book revealed to you — so let there be no distress in your breast from it — that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers.
